text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaagh! Princess coming through!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay, I did it! Another beautiful, graceful, courageous day—and a
big win!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You've got that right! It's all because—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: —I've got my fateful partner! The prince of my future is with me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The moment we bonded there was a big bang of a miracle! That's the
real power of a bond!
choice_data_list: Your confidence is through the roof...
Your confidence is through the roof...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: There's no doubt about that! I learned it all from Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wherever it came from, confidence is always a good thing. So long as
she can keep this up—

Hmph. It seems I've finally found you, would-be princess. Or should I
say, overconfident commoner?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, "would-be"?! And who are you?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Heh... Can you not tell by my aura brimming with princess spirit? I'm the real princess here! And the strongest too—my princess power is over 100 billion!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what your level is! I'm a fantastic princess! I even found
my prince!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Hm? A prince, you say? You don't mean that trainer there, do you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! You're so plain, I didn't even notice you! Like a paltry piece
of carrot in cheap instant noodles!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
M-my trainer is nothing of the sort! My trainer's like, um... wagyu
steak topped with caviar—
choice_data_list: Can we stop with the food comparisons?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Heh... If you're so mad about it, why don't you race me and make me shut up? I'll personally show you what a real princess can do!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I was about to say the same thing! You'll take back those words once I
beat the daylights out of you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(I've seen this Umamusume before. She's a veteran with some serious
Twinkle Series wins under her belt!)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry! There's no way I'd lose to a bully like that. I'll leave
her in my dust and win the race in time for tea!
choice_data_list: Let's at least come up with a plan!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on. You worry way too much! I don't need any tactics or
anything! Because...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We've got the invincible power of our bond! Just trust it and wait for
my return!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My attempts to stop her go unheard. Maybe she's gotten a little too confident...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've got a good pace now! Time to cut straight through to the
finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is running in top form like usual, but the
curly-haired rival princess is trailing eerily close behind her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Heh... Are you all talk, Kawakami? What do you think a princess is?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I know exactly what a princess is! Beautiful, graceful, and
courageous...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, mwahahaha! Don't make me laugh! Here, I'll tell you
something useful!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text:
It's the undeniable, overwhelming power to crush those beneath
you—that's what makes a true princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Aaahahahaha! If you'll excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami tries desperately to catch up, but by the end, she finishes
three lengths behind.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ugh, why?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Princess Curls
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh, aaahahahagh! Cough, cough! This is the difference between a real princess... and a fake!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Waaah! It's not faaair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess runs off before I even have a chance to console
her...
